resources.string: Enter your details below to log back into\nyour account
Social sign-in failed. Please try again.
Fill up this form to create a new\naccount
Enter your email to receive a password reset link
Where will you check in next?
Enjoy every moment of your journey.
Step-by-step tips to find the right stay.
Pick the perfect itinerary at the best price.
Are you sure you want to log out?
Become a partner to provide Tours and Hotels
You have already submitted a registration. Tap to view status.
Personal information is used to contact you when you book a tour or hotel.
Password must be at least 6 characters
Too many requests, please try again in a few minutes
New password must differ from the old one
Something went wrong, please try again
Please login to perform this action
Account registered successfully! Welcome to TourGo.
Recovery email sent!\nPlease check your inbox.
Login failed. Please check your credentials.
You don\'t have permission to do that
Please select check-in and check-out dates
Check-in date cannot be in the past
Check-out date must be after check-in date
Selected date range includes sold-out nights
Number of guests must be greater than 0
Please login to book a room
Could not identify hotel or tour
Your booking request has been sent. Please check your email for confirmation.
You need to book this hotel before writing a review.
Are you sure you want to delete this review?
The review has been submitted, but some photos haven\'t been uploaded yet.
Notes about this review… (visible to admins only)
The business will be notified with your admin notes. They can re-submit after edits.
The business will receive your notes and can re-submit when ready.
Report approved · user banned & comment removed
Try a different filter or search term.
%s will lose access until reactivated. Their published listings will be hidden from travelers.
%s will regain access and their listings will become visible to travelers again.
%s will lose access to bookings, reviews and the marketplace until reactivated.
Ask for a one-time code at every admin sign-in.
New password must be at least 8 characters
Hide once the report threshold is met
New listing photos need manual review
Target time to clear the queue
Owners manage billing & roles. Moderators clear the queue only.
Email of an existing TourGo account
Something went wrong. Please try again.
When a business submits for review
A listing or review is flagged
An admin is added or removed
Security alerts can\'t be disabled for owners. Delivered to admin@tourgo.app.
Changing the language updates the admin console only. Traveler-facing content keeps its original locale.
Good · add a symbol for a stronger password
Off · your account is less secure
How do I approve or reject a business?
Open the Moderation tab, tap a pending business card, then use the Approve or Reject buttons. Rejections send an email with your reason attached.
What happens when I lock an account?
The business loses dashboard access immediately but their published listings stay visible. Unlock anytime from Account Management.
When a listing reaches the report threshold set in Moderation policy, it is hidden automatically and queued for review.
Can I change another admin\'s role?
Owners can. Open Admin team & roles, tap the menu beside a member, and choose Change role.
Amenities (separated by commas, e.g., Tour guide, Cruise ship)
Tap to select a cover image
No tours are pending review yet
Booking updates, offers and reminders will show up here.
Your stay at The Grand Orchid Resort is confirmed for Aug 13 – 15.
Your payment for booking #TG-4821 went through.
Check-in at The Grand Orchid Resort opens 2:00 PM. Pack your bags!
A limited-time discount is waiting in your account.
Lavender Lakehouse is now $149 / night — down 16%.
Share a quick review and help other travelers choose.
Your account password was changed successfully.
We\'ve updated our cancellation terms — tap to review what changed.
Your Kyoto Old Town walking tour begins Aug 13.
Amelia R. booked The Grand Orchid Resort · Suite 2 for Aug 22 – 25.
Payout for booking #TG-4821 has cleared to your account.
Only 2 rooms left for Aug 18 – 20. Consider opening more inventory.
Guests arrive at The Grand Orchid Resort from 2:00 PM.
Our team responded about your payout schedule question.
“Spotless rooms and a wonderful host. Will return!”
Listings featured this week get up to 30% more views.
TourGo Business will be briefly unavailable during the update.
Lotus Travel Co. submitted documents for verification.
Orchid Hospitality requested a payout to bank •4471.
Booking gateway p95 above 1.2s for the last 15 minutes.
“Sunset Villa” flagged for misleading photos by 3 travelers.
Account harry_b posted 6 reviews in 4 minutes.
Platform GMV crossed $1.0M this month — a new record.
Active travelers up 18% week over week.
Database upgrade scheduled for Sun 2:00 – 3:00 AM UTC.
You have 3 check-ins today and 8 reviews waiting for a reply.
Try a different filter, or add a new listing to get started.
Drafts you save will appear in this tab.
This will remove \"%s\" and all its bookings history. This action cannot be undone.
Standard check-out is 11:00 AM. Late check-out applies a $35 fee per booking.
Late check-out after 11:00 AM applies a $35 fee, billed to the guest automatically.
Reports you submit go to TourGo moderators for final review.
When a guest review is flagged, it\'ll appear here for you to review.
All progress on this form will be lost. Save as draft instead?
Pick a category and give your listing a name.
A short description of your listing…
Help guests find you and know what to expect.
You can adjust seasonal rates and fees below.
Charge more during peak season (Dec–Feb), less in off-peak.
Mark dates as open, blocked, or part of a custom range.
Double-check everything below. You can edit later.
I agree to TourGo\'s Host Terms and confirm this listing complies with local regulations.
The system will automatically confirm after receiving the money.
Please transfer the EXACT amount and with the correct transaction details so that the system can automatically confirm the payment.
Scan the QR code to make a transfer.
